title: sedum × rubrotinctum
intro: Sedum × rubrotinctum, also known as Jelly Bean Sedum, is a hybrid succulent plant that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sedum × rubrotinctum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Sedum × rubrotinctum can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
